name: ai-legal-intelligence-system
description: India's legal system faces a massive backlog of **50 million pending court cases**. Approximately **70% of citizens cannot afford a lawyer**, and undertrial prisoners often wait over **3 years** for their first hearing. Legal professionals spend countless hours manually searching through **200 years of case law** across **22 languages** to find relevant precedents. Furthermore, legal documents are often filled with dense legalese, making them inaccessible to the very people they concern.
